    July 14, 2026 11:51

    feat(lint): add Flow.Node render rule #618

    Merged stritt  merged 2 commits

    Summary

    • Add kumo/no-flow-node-custom-render to enforce Flow.Node render={<CustomComponent />} passthrough requirements.
    • Verify local custom render components forward refs and spread received props.
    • Enable the rule in root, package, and docs oxlint configs.

    Tests

    • pnpm --filter @cloudflare/kumo exec vitest run --project=unit tests/lint/no-flow…

    July 6, 2026 11:29

    refactor(flow): rebuild layout algorithm from scratch #430

    Merged mattrothenberg  merged 11 commits

    This PR rebuilds Flow to use a bespoke layout algorithm instead of relying on the DOM's layout algorithm.

    Problem

    The existing Flow implementation relies on the DOM to layout the nodes in the diagram, which keeps things simple and allows us to position nodes using CSS.

    The problem is the arrows that we draw between nodes need explicit coordinat…

    Read more

    June 22, 2026 11:10

    feat(toolbar): add Toolbar component #591

    Merged mattrothenberg  merged 7 commits

    Summary

    Adds a new Toolbar component for composing adjacent form controls into a shared grouped card.

    Why not a block?

    The internal implementation of the form control components need to change to get the API that I wanted (see above).

    Changes

    • Adds Toolbar source, exports, build entries, and package metadata.
    • Integrates Button, Input, Select, C…

    June 18, 2026 22:05

    Split oversized modules 05–06 into 05–09; renumber course to 15 modules #1

    Merged simpulton  merged 19 commits

    Why

    Modules 05 (Auth & storage state) and 06 (API + UI hybrid) were ~3× the size of every other module — 15 and 23 files, 334 and 1054 lines added, vs. the 1–7 file / 13–122 line norm — and their READMEs taught only a fraction of what they produced (≈900 words for 1054 lines of code, with ... elisions and most page objects/step files never menti…

    Read more
    All reactions
    Dismissed a request from onehungrymind/modern-e2e-quickstart. Thank you for the feedback!
